title: 3.1 & 3.2 Incubation Recovery & Pre-Amplification PCR
author: Opentrons
description: This is the first of four parts for a custom PCR prep followed by two stage cleanup.
steps_raw: This is the first of four parts for a custom PCR prep followed by two stage cleanup.
125 uL of recovery agent is added to samples
2 minute delay until a biphasic mixture is attained
Visual inspection should occur of the biphasic mixture then resume is selected in the app.
Recovery agent is removed from the samples, leaving only a clear liquid in the wells
35 uL of pre-amplification mix is added to the samples
Samples are moved to a PCR strip tube prior to thermocycler step as outlined in procedure documentation
materials_raw: Eppendorf 96 Well Plate 200 µL on Opentrons Semi-Skirted Adapter
Eppendorf 96 Well Plate 200 µL on Aluminum Block 200 µL
Opentrons 24 Well Aluminum Block with NEST 2 mL Snapcap
Opentrons 96 Tip Rack 300 µL or Opentrons 96 Filter Tip Rack 200 µL
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
